title: GEEPAS Steam Iron | Clothes Dry & Steam Press | 30s Fast Heat-Up, Vertical Steaming | Nonstick Soleplate, Adjustable Temperature | 120ml Water Tank with 0.5g/Steam Output | 2 Year Warranty 1800W Red
features: ✅ POWERFUL 1800W PERFORMANCE, FAST HEAT-UP – The Geepas Steam irons deliver quick 30 seconds heat-up and efficient ironing. It ensures faster crease removal, making ironing effortless and saving time on busy mornings.

✅ NONSTICK SOLEPLATE – The flat iron is equipped with a nonstick soleplate, iron steamer glides seamlessly over all fabric types without snagging or burning. The thick soleplate ensures even heat distribution for a professional finish.

✅ ADJUSTABLE TEMPERATURE, VARIABLE STEAM CONTROL – Lightweight steam irons feature a customizable thermostat dial to suit fabrics like cotton, silk, linen, wool, and synthetics. Choose from continuous steam (12g/min) or steam burst (0.5g/min) for stubborn creases.

✅ LARGE 120ML WATER TANK, POWERFUL STEAM OUTPUT – Equipped with a 120ml water tank, this steam iron ensures long ironing sessions. Delivers a continuous steam flow of 12g/min and a steam boost of 0.5g/min, effectively removing stubborn creases for crisp, professional results.
✅ SAFETY FUNCTION – The heat-resistant, shockproof ergonomic handle ensures a secure grip, making ironing comfortable and safe.
description: Product Description POWERFUL CREASE REMOVAL Provides precision steaming across small and large garments and steam boost for tough creases. 120 ML WATER TANK This steam iron contains a 120 ml water tank. Filling it completely, you can iron a large number of clothes without adding extra water. PRECISE TEMPERATURE CONTROL You can easily adjust the temperature according to the fabric type by moving the rotatable temperature control. NON- STICK SOLEPLATE The non-stick plate will ensure a smooth and soft glide of the iron over the fabric. EASY TO HOLD HANDLE The handle repeats the shape of the hand, which makes it convenient to hold it for the entire ironing. MULTI FUNCTION IRONING Suitable for all fabrics such as wool, silk, linen, cotton etc. STEAM &SPRAY OUTPUT CONTROLLER It ensures superior heat distribution and a smooth glide to get through even the toughest of fabrics in no time. 360° SWIVEL CORD PROTECTION No more worrying about stains or burning clothes to an iron plate.
